free_text: Microscopic and macroscopic DWBA analysis of the
reactions  Si-28(a,d)P-30, S-32(d,a)P-30 and
S-32(a,d)Cl-34 studied at E(a)=50 MeV and
E(d)=40 MeV.
theory
.Microscopic, macroscopic DWBA calculations.
delta-E-E silicon counter telescopes.
By CAJAD.
.The error in the absolute cross sections is
estimated to be about 25%, due to the uncertainties in
the target thickness and the solid angles.
.Digitizing error of angle.

S.B
A self-supporting Si-nat foil, enriched to 92% Si-28,
thickness of 85-mug/cm**2 thick were used.
Correction for oxygen contamination by using the known
cross section for the O-16(a,d)F-18 reaction
A solid and gas target were used. The solid target,
consisted of 350 mug/cm**2 sulphur evaporated on carbon
foil, 10 mug/cm**2 thick.
For absolute cross section measurements a 70 mm
diameter gas cell was used with 12 mum thick Kapton
windows.
